description: Composition Maroon and pink sleeveless sweater made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylon, has striped front and plain back, V-neck, ribbed arm openings and hemline, velvet strip at inner back neck and small metal logo on lower front Fit Regular Wash care Do not bleach Dry clean After dry cleaning store in a sealer bag with moth balls in a porous sachet Lovely tones of pink and maroon in horizontal stripes are flattering to the figure while the deep V-neck and sleeveless shape mean this sweater looks great worn over a crisp white shirt. Great to wear on a cool day when you need just one extra layer to keep you warm. Model statistics Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
